PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHELIFE, KARIM MED AN INDIVIDUAL YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,696.36 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,696.36, CROSS COMPLAINT OF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC. DBA YELLOW CAB IS DENIED. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
